# editor-toy

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Interactive in-memory block-editor toy on the Apps pillar page: a real <BlockEditor> running non-persisting (React state only, no server rows), with a curated text-block palette and a Reset-to-reseed control — the Pages editor, playable in the browser.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `WebsiteApps.Section` "Live editor demo" → `EditorToySection`
  - Uses:
    - `apps/website/pillars/apps.WebsiteApps`
    - `page/editor.BlockEditor`
    - `primitives/css/badge.Badge`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/surface.Surface`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
